assertions.title: Memory pressure — DPI fallback on canvas failure
assertions.reason: With `?dpi-fallback-test=true`, the flow completed end-to-end and the done screen displayed the reduced-quality fallback warning while still producing a downloadable output PDF.

steps.action: Open preview URL with `dpi-fallback-test=true` and upload `edge-r2-input.pdf`
steps.expected: App proceeds through upload and review state successfully
steps.observed: Upload accepted and review screen rendered with active "Download redacted PDF" action

steps.expected: Processing appears, then done screen with reduced DPI warning if fallback path is used
steps.observed: Processing screen was visible, then done screen showed: "Reduced output quality due to memory constraints..." and displayed output name `edge-r2-input-redacted.pdf`

steps.expected: No crash-level runtime failures during fallback completion
steps.observed: No page errors from `agent-browser errors`; console showed only CSP/X-Frame-Options meta-delivery warnings; `agent-browser network requests` reported no requests captured

evidence.consoleErrors: none from page runtime; console contained: 'The Content Security Policy directive frame-ancestors is ignored when delivered via a <meta> element.' and 'X-Frame-Options may only be set via an HTTP header...'
evidence.network: No requests captured by `agent-browser network requests` during this run.

frictions.description: Hidden `input[type=file]` was not directly exposed in interactive refs for upload.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily exposed the file input via in-page eval and uploaded through the now-visible control.

frictions.description: Downloaded artifact was saved with a UUID filename in headless mode rather than the app's displayed output filename.
frictions.resolution: Used done-screen text to confirm expected filename (`edge-r2-input-redacted.pdf`) and copied the UUID download artifact to `edge-r2-input-redacted-download.pdf` for stable evidence retention.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-EDGE-003): pass. Forced DPI fallback path completed successfully with warning text shown and downloadable output produced.
